title: Traveler Mod
description: This mod adds lots of new tools and armor using vanilla items and also adds lots of new vanilla like things!
body:
### **Note!** **If** your playing on the Fabric version, this mod Requires **Fabric API**! If Fabric API is not installed the profile **Will Not Launch!** (If your playing on Forge no other mod needs to be installed.

### 📖 What's this mod?
This mod adds **Lots of new Tools and Armor** using **Vanilla items**. It also adds lots of **New vanilla like things** and **More to come!**

### ✅ Features:
* **Amethyst Tools & Armor**.
* **Stone Armor**.
* **Ruby** (With a set of Tools, Armor, & a **Ruby Block**).
* **Petrified Wood**.
* **Dried Leaves**.
* **Steel** (With a set of Tools, Armor, & a **Steel Block**).
* (**Flint and Steel** is now made with **Steel**).
* **Copper Tools**.
* One **New Painting**.
* **Coal Tools**.
* A **Redstone Sword** (Sets entitys on fire when hit).
* **Red Maple Trees** (They spawn everywhere in the **Overworld**) (Has special tools).

### Crafting Recipes
**Amethyst** (Chestplate and Axe)
